title: Disable Double Tap to Sprint
description: Disables double tapping the Forward key to start sprinting
body:
## Notice: This mod is no longer needed in Minecraft 1.21.9 and above. To disable double tap sprint in 1.21.9+, go to Controls and set Sprint Window to 0

## What

Disables double tapping the Forward key to start sprinting. That's it.

No dependencies, works on every Minecraft version where Fabric and NeoForge exist.

## Why

Minecraft has had a dedicated sprint keybind since version 1.7.2. Unless you absolutely need a double tap to sprint function for accessibility purposes, there is no reason to use it over the dedicated sprint keybind, and all it does is cause accidental sprint startups which waste your hunger points.

...Well, that's what I think, at least. So I made this mod for my own sanity. Use it if you want.
